skill1.kitLine: Start of battle (if self alive), all allies: Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 6% continuously

skill1.note: Status-cancel; inert for DPS, formation state handled by reenterStage/atkPct gating instead

skill1.kitLine: noB1 Effect 2: My Own Star — self ATK ▲ 40.01%, continuous, cannot be removed
noB1 Effect 3: all allies Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 7.48 sec (on Full Burst end)
hasB1 Effect 1: Cancels My Own Star
skill1.note: Status-cancel; inert, formation gating covers the swap

skill1.kitLine: hasB1 Effect 2: Everyone's Star — re-enters Burst, changes to Stage 1, continuous
skill1.note: Now uses real reenterStage mechanic (was a burstEligibility approximation)

skill1.kitLine: On landing Full Charge attack, target: 120.13% of final ATK as additional damage
skill1.note: Trigger is shotFired not fullCharge specifically — note justifies: RL always full-charges, so per-pull is equivalent

skill2.kitLine: On Full Burst enter while My Own Star, all allies: ATK ▲ 35.01% of caster ATK for 10s
skill2.note: Exact value/duration; correctly caster-scaled and noB1-gated

skill2.kitLine: On Full Charge while Everyone's Star, all allies: restore 1.26% of caster final Max HP as HP
skill2.note: Heal — defensive, no DPS impact (F1 crown consumer per ks findings)

skill2.kitLine: On Full Burst enter, self + allies with lower final DEF than self: Projectile Explosion Damage ▲ 92.03% for 10s
skill2.note: Value exact; 'lower-DEF-than-self' target simplified to ALL allies (she is a high-DEF Defender) — documented approximation

skill2.kitLine: On Full Burst enter, all allies: Attack Damage ▲ 34% for 10s

burst.kitLine: Shooting Stars: 40.01% of final ATK, interval 0.25s, duration 10s (auto random-target)
burst.where: burst[0] effect[0] dot atkPct 40.01 10s interval 0.25 flavor:projectileExplosion
burst.note: 40 ticks; carries projectileExplosion flavor (benefits from her own S2 aura); as a rider never receives core damage
AoE-radius — irrelevant vs single partless boss
Defensive, no DPS impact (F2 per ks findings)

burst.kitLine: While My Own Star, self: Attack Damage ▲ 35.2% for 10s
While Everyone's Star, all allies: Max HP ▲ 15.02% of caster max HP for 10s
burst.note: Added 2026-07-17 THEME-13 for kit-SSOT completeness; offensively INERT (ally Max HP does not feed teammate atkOfMaxHpPct, e3 rule) — moves no board damage

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 'Cancels Everyone's Star' / 'Cancels My Own Star' status-cancels dropped
documentedConfounds.why: Pure status bookkeeping; formation gating (atkPct/reenterStage) already represents the active swap, no DPS effect

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 Everyone's-Star heal (1.26% caster Max HP) dropped

documentedConfounds.why: AoE radius is inert against a single partless boss

documentedConfounds.text: S2 Projectile Explosion Damage 92.03% target 'allies with lower DEF than self' approximated as ALL allies
documentedConfounds.why: Over-grants projExpl to any ally out-DEFing Anis → sim over-predicts → low ratio (COLD). Dedicated 'TB2T2 anis-star projExpl probe' reads 0.868 (sim ~13% high), directly implicating this approximation

documentedConfounds.text: Dedicated projExpl probe comp = 0.868; board COLD (ratio 0.954, MAD 0.054, range 0.80–1.04)
documentedConfounds.why: The two lowest records (PA MiKa 0.80, projExpl probe 0.87) drive the COLD band; the projExpl probe is a targeted test of the one modeled mechanic most likely to over-predict

documentedConfounds.text: Tia counts as 'B1+' (re-entry B1) for formation — edge case deliberately NOT modeled
documentedConfounds.why: Only occurs in tia+anis (inefficient pairing); probe run C explicitly EXCLUDED from anis validation

documentedConfounds.text: Shooting Stars never receive core damage (rider)
documentedConfounds.why: Documented correct behavior, not a gap

documentedConfounds.text: Everyone's-Star Max HP grant is offensively inert (e3 rule: ally Max HP doesn't feed teammate atkOfMaxHpPct)
documentedConfounds.why: Kept for SSOT completeness only; moves no board damage by construction

documentedConfounds.text: Everyone's-Star burst re-entry now uses real reenterStage (was burstEligibility approximation)
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved 2026-07-13; no longer an open approximation

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Anis:Star as a formation-gated Burst-I Defender (patterned on Rapi:RH): noB1 'My Own Star' grants continuous self ATK 40.01% + team burst CDR 7.48s and unlocks the S2 caster-ATK 35.01% and burst self Attack Damage 35.2%; hasB1 'Everyone's Star' replaces those riders with real burst re-entry at Stage 1. The formation-independent core (team burst-gen 6%, full-charge 120.13% additional damage, Full-Burst Attack Damage 34% + Projectile Explosion 92.03%, Shooting Stars projectileExplosion dot, and the 0.7s charge-fix) is fully modeled with exact values. Known-not-faithful spots are all documented: defensive/AoE lines dropped (heal, DEF, Explosion Radius), the 'lower-DEF allies' projExpl target simplified to all allies, and the Max-HP grant kept only for SSOT completeness (offensively inert). The board is COLD (0.954, MAD 0.054) and the dedicated projExpl probe reading 0.868 points at the all-allies projExpl approximation as the most likely remaining gap source.
